region_name: Hull and East Yorkshire Combined Authority
cluster_name: Hull and East Yorkshire Combined Authority Innovation Ecosystem
strap: Hull and East Yorkshire Combined Authority's innovation footprint draws £1.98bn of UKRI lead-led funding across 2,046 grants spanning 4 active clusters, with Hull and East Yorkshire Advanced Manufacturing (33%) the largest single cluster and York (45%) the dominant regional anchor by UKRI £.
behaviour: The region shows medium-confidence "Validation–Coordination" stabilisation stacks at ecosystem grain — validation activity recurs through programmes and partnerships without the testing-and-narrowing motion that converts capability into market position.
